title: ucase-evidence-ledger-v1
description: The whole proof/evidence ledger (`.use-cases/evidence.jsonl`) modelled as an ordered, append-only sequence of proof events. This is the file-level contract — distinct from the per-entry proof-event schema (ucase-proof-event-v1). The append-only/ordering contract: existing lines are never edited or deleted, new proof events are only appended at the tail, and entry index order is significant and immutable. Each entry MUST additionally validate against the ucase-proof-event-v1 schema.

entry.$comment: additionalProperties is true so a full ucase-proof-event-v1 object validates here; only the envelope fields needed to enforce the ledger contract are constrained. Each entry MUST also validate against ucase-proof-event-v1.

entry_index.description: OPTIONAL tamper-evident chain field: the entry's absolute 0-based position in the ledger. When present it MUST equal the line's index. Omitted on legacy proofs minted before the chain existed.

previous_entry_hash.description: OPTIONAL tamper-evident chain field: sha256 of the previous entry's full canonical JSON, or the genesis sentinel (sha256:<64 zeros>) for the first entry. Omitted on legacy proofs.

ledger_schema_id.description: File-level ledger schema id (distinct from the per-entry ucase-proof-event-v1).

append_only.description: Asserts the append-only discipline: existing lines are immutable; events are only appended at the tail.

entries.description: Proof events in file/append order. Index order is significant and immutable; line N maps to entries[N-1].
